title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Ambuja Cements

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Ambuja Cements
jsonLd.description:
Ambuja Cements is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
